title: Open Application (Innovation Team)
description: Speculative application to Ipsos Denmark expressing interest in junior roles within the Innovation or Insights team. Previously spoke with Ipsos consultant in Shanghai about IVD market landscape. Applying to Senior Insight Consultant posting but open to junior positions.
match_reasons: Prior contact with Ipsos consultant in Shanghai|3-month consulting internship at IQVIA (market research, client delivery)|Genuine interest in consumer insights and market research|Data analysis and stakeholder communication skills
gaps: No quantitative market research experience (5-6 years required)|No innovation studies experience (concept/product/pack tests)|Senior role vs. entry-level background|No agency experience
